body:
Adds types
 - `GPJL`, `SKLJL` for dispatch over which package to use
 - `YType`, `FType` to dispatch over which prediction method to call in GaussianProcesses.jl

Converts
```
push!(mean, mu)
push!(var, sig2)
```
to a list comprehension plus `first.(...)`, `last.(...)` to avoid dynamic memory allocation.
title: Improve memory management & flow control with dispatch
